---
title: "BayesRTMB"
author: "Hiroshi Shimizu"
date: "2026-04-04"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## library
```{r}
library(RTMB)
library(posterior)
library(R6)
library(future.apply)
library(progressr)
library(devtools)
```


```{r}
file.remove("NAMESPACE")
# document create
devtools::document()

# loading
devtools::load_all()

?RTMB_Model
?MCMC_Fit

devtools::check()

usethis::use_readme_rmd()
devtools::build_readme()
usethis::use_mit_license("Hiroshi Shimizu")
```
